name: Breithorn and Cima di Jazzi 2-day ski tour group from Zermatt

longDescription: Discover Breithorn and Cima di Jazzi 2-day ski tour group from Zermatt in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Ski touring
subcategory.description: Book your next ski touring adventure with a professional guide. Ski tours offer an ideal opportunity to explore the magnificent Swiss mountains in winter. You hike up a mountain with special touring skis and then ski back down to the valley through deep snow. Ski tours can last from a few hours to several days. For safety reasons, you should never go on a ski tour alone. On a guided tour with an experienced mountain guide or tour leader, you can join a tour that is tailored to your previous knowledge and fitness level.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online
